function.message: I could not complete this inbox item because one requested source file is missing: `50_finance/purchases/_2025_12_05__eur_000044__bill__house_mesh_esp32_order.md` (underscore-prefixed). I found only `50_finance/purchases/2025_12_05__eur_000044__bill__house_mesh_esp32_order.md`. Please confirm the intended fifth file path (or whether item #5 was a duplicate) and I can proceed.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox workflow requiring processing of the specified next item and no mutation when blocked; applied inbox v2 update instruction to avoid partial edits when task is not doable.
function.outcome_justification: The request explicitly listed 5 files, but the 5th path could not be read (file not found). A follow-up search in `50_finance/purchases` for `house_mesh_esp32_order` returned matches only in the non-underscored file, confirming the listed underscore path is missing. Completing only 4/5 would be a partial result, so clarification is required.
